examples: After all I'm a man, not a louse.
Contagious: a human head louse clings to a strand of hair.
Anyway, I belonged to another hierarchy. They wouldn't even share a louse with the likes of me.
Their liens will louse up your title to property and devastate your credit rating.
Or will we assert our inalienable right to louse things up, each in our own individual way?
